dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.evidence: Focused tests pass, but actual consumers are not wired: cross-model review still reads only project .furrow/.claude config, rws ignores XDG gate defaults, preferred_specialists has no runtime use, and rws state init never writes source_todos.

dimensions.name: test-coverage
dimensions.evidence: source_todos test exercises a local helper plus commands/next.md text, not the real handoff/runtime path; no tests catch missing XDG wiring for cross_model.provider, gate_policy defaults, or preferred_specialists.

dimensions.name: spec-compliance
dimensions.evidence: XDG config is implemented as helper/scaffolding but not as the specified global defaults tier for the relevant consumers; source_todos is schema/doc-only and not threaded into state initialization.

dimensions.name: unplanned-changes
dimensions.evidence: config-cleanup ownership lists only 8 paths, but the change set includes many tests, fixtures, upgrade scripts, install.sh, merge/reintegration files, hooks, and .furrow artifacts without deliverable-specific ownership justification.

dimensions.name: code-quality
dimensions.evidence: shellcheck exits 1 on changed surfaces, including SC2097/SC2098 in upgrade/promotion-target tests and SC2129 in bin/frw.d/install.sh.
